name: reconstruction_eg_lite_seed42_v1
purpose: Run the active matched-budget HoRU EG-Lite screen on the available public ISOLET, WISDM, and NinaPro inputs; never a paper-reproduction claim.

protocol.metric: mean_personalized_accuracy: unweighted subject/client mean for both methods

limitations: The extension is not a method reported by the supplied manuscript provenance record.
ISOLET federation remains the repository's Dirichlet reconstruction candidate rather than an established original split.
This is a single-seed screening and may not be described as a paper reproduction.
